summary: Execute RRA follow-up now: email immediately and schedule 08:30 CAT call next business day to secure a 30-minute discovery/demo this week.
reasoning: Highest-impact overdue revenue task with idle sales capacity; prior decisions remain unexecuted. It is after-hours in Kigali, so email now and call at 08:30 CAT next business day to advance the deal and reduce backlog.

task.title: RRA follow-up: email now; schedule 08:30 CAT call next business day to book 30-minute discovery/demo
task.description:
- Reuse the existing RRA follow-up playbook with these constraints.
1) Review CRM/account notes and last correspondence; verify primary and alternate contacts and any procurement/compliance context.
2) Because it is outside Kigali business hours (08:30–17:30 CAT), do not call now. Create a call task for 08:30 CAT next business day with reminder and call script ready.
3) Send a concise follow-up email immediately to the primary contact (cc known stakeholders) proposing three 30-minute time slots within the next 3 business days (Kigali time); include a one-pager and a relevant case study; state a clear agenda and value.
4) On live contact (tomorrow’s call or email reply), confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and any procurement/compliance requirements; capture objections; aim to book the 30-minute discovery/demo.
5) If the primary is unreachable at 08:30 CAT, leave voicemail (if available) and attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard within 10 minutes.
6) Log all attempts, emails, and outcomes in the CRM; either book the meeting or schedule the next follow-up within 48 hours with blockers noted.
7) If numbers are invalid or email bounces, immediately flag specific gaps for enrichment and hand off to the research agent.
8) Deadlines: send the email and set the call task/reminder within 60 minutes and post a brief status update; after the 08:30 CAT call attempt, post a second status update.
